title: senecio riojanus
intro: Senecio riojanus, also known as Rioja ragwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Senecio riojanus include the relief of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties, although caution is advised due to potential toxicity.
